policy: Every public OpenAPI operation requires certification evidence before promotion.

endpoints.purpose: Evaluate caller-supplied, source-owned Core evidence for the first high-cash opportunity signal family.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use as the RFC-0002 Slice 10 API foundation for deterministic high-cash evaluation when the caller already has source-authorized evidence references and cash weight.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as a live source-ingestion API, data-product certification proof, Gateway contract, Workbench product proof, or supported-feature promotion.
error_examples: 403 returns product-safe Problem Details when the caller lacks idea.signal.evaluate capability.
400 returns product-safe Problem Details when request validation fails.
endpoints.openapi_evidence: scripts/openapi_quality_gate.py validates summary, description, tag, responses, and examples.

endpoints.purpose: Evaluate caller-supplied, source-owned Core evidence for the first high-cash opportunity signal family and persist created candidates through the internal idempotency and audit repository foundation.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use as the RFC-0002 Slice 06 and Slice 10 API foundation when an internal caller already has source-authorized evidence references, source-reported cash weight, an Idempotency-Key, and candidate persistence capability.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as a live source-ingestion API, data-product certification proof, Gateway contract, Workbench product proof, or supported-feature promotion. PostgreSQL persistence, replay, and source-ingestion recovery proof applies only when the PostgreSQL repository adapter is configured and does not certify production storage, live Core source-worker readiness, or supported product readiness.
error_examples: 403 returns product-safe Problem Details when the caller lacks idea.candidate.persist capability.
409 returns product-safe Problem Details when the idempotency key was already used with a different request payload.
400 returns product-safe Problem Details when request validation fails or Idempotency-Key is absent or blank.
endpoints.openapi_evidence: scripts/openapi_quality_gate.py validates summary, description, tag, responses, and examples.

endpoints.purpose: Record an internal governed lifecycle transition for a persisted idea candidate through the lifecycle history, idempotency, and audit foundation.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use as the RFC-0002 Slice 06 and Slice 10 API foundation when an internal caller has a persisted candidate, the idea.candidate.lifecycle.transition capability, an Idempotency-Key, and needs to move the candidate through the canonical lifecycle graph before review or conversion workflows.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as durable database persistence proof, downstream proposal authority, manage-review authority, report authority, suitability approval, execution authority, client-communication authority, Gateway contract, Workbench product proof, or supported-feature promotion.
error_examples: 403 returns product-safe Problem Details when the caller lacks idea.candidate.lifecycle.transition capability.
404 returns product-safe Problem Details when the candidate is not found.
409 returns product-safe Problem Details for idempotency conflict or invalid lifecycle transition.
400 returns product-safe Problem Details when request validation fails or Idempotency-Key is absent or blank.
endpoints.openapi_evidence: scripts/openapi_quality_gate.py validates summary, description, tag, responses, and examples.

endpoints.purpose: Return a source-safe internal detail projection for a persisted idea candidate, including redacted source evidence, lifecycle history, review, feedback, conversion, report-evidence, and audit summary posture.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use as the RFC-0002 Slice 10 and Slice 11 API foundation when an internal caller has idea.candidate.detail.read capability or an advisor/operator role and needs a source-safe evidence-drawer projection for an existing candidate.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Read-only Gateway publication exists through lotus-gateway GET /api/v1/ideas/candidates/{candidate_id}. Do not use as Workbench product proof, data-product certification proof, source-system route disclosure, raw evidence export, downstream authority, client-ready publication, or supported-feature promotion.
error_examples: 403 returns product-safe Problem Details when the caller lacks idea.candidate.detail.read capability or an allowed advisor/operator role.
404 returns product-safe Problem Details when the candidate is not found.
400 returns product-safe Problem Details when candidateId is blank.
endpoints.openapi_evidence: scripts/openapi_quality_gate.py validates summary, description, tag, responses, and examples.

endpoints.purpose: Replay the persisted evidence hash posture for an internal idea candidate against caller-supplied current source refs without exposing raw source routes or payloads.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use as the RFC-0002 Slice 06, Slice 10, and Slice 15 API foundation when an internal operator has idea.candidate.evidence.replay capability and needs product-safe matched, stale-source, hash-mismatch, expired, or missing-candidate replay posture for an existing persisted candidate.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as live Core source-ingestion proof, data-product certification proof, downstream workflow execution proof, source-system route disclosure, raw evidence export, Gateway contract, Workbench product proof, durable production recovery certification, client-ready publication, or supported-feature promotion.
error_examples: 403 returns product-safe Problem Details when the caller lacks idea.candidate.evidence.replay capability or operator role.
404 returns product-safe Problem Details when the candidate is not found for evidence replay.
400 returns product-safe Problem Details when currentSourceRefs is empty or request validation fails.
endpoints.openapi_evidence: scripts/openapi_quality_gate.py validates summary, description, tag, responses, and examples.

endpoints.purpose: Evaluate an internal AI explanation workflow result or deterministic fallback against a persisted idea candidate with redaction, source-claim verification, forbidden-action blocking, and bounded operation telemetry.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use as the RFC-0002 Slice 09 and Slice 10 API foundation when an internal caller has a persisted candidate, idea.ai-explanation.evaluate capability, and needs governed AI explanation evaluation without provider execution.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as lotus-ai runtime proof, AI provider execution proof, durable AI lineage storage, autonomous advice, suitability approval, downstream authority, Gateway contract, Workbench product proof, data-product certification proof, or supported-feature promotion.
request_examples: {"requestId":"ai-explanation-001","workflowPack":{"workflowPackId":"lotus-ai:idea-explanation:v1","workflowPackVersion":"v1","purpose":"advisor_rationale_draft","evaluationRef":"lotus-ai:governed-verifier:v1"},"approvedMetadata":{"channel":"advisor-workbench"},"requestedAtUtc":"2026-06-21T10:12:00Z","fallbackReason":"ai_unavailable","workflowOutput":{"outputId":"ai-output-001","explanationText":"Candidate has elevated idle cash and source-ready evidence.","claims":[{"claimId":"claim-001","claimText":"Cash weight is above idle-liquidity policy threshold.","sourceProductIds":["lotus-core:PortfolioStateSnapshot:v1"]}],"proposedActions":[{"actionType":"advisor_review","actionLabel":"Route to advisor review"}],"verifierRanAtUtc":"2026-06-21T10:12:30Z"}}
response_examples: {"requestId":"ai-explanation-001","candidateId":"idea_high_cash_8d57adbf52f7f5a7","workflowPack":{"workflowPackId":"lotus-ai:idea-explanation:v1","workflowPackVersion":"v1","purpose":"advisor_rationale_draft","evaluationRef":"lotus-ai:governed-verifier:v1","sourceAuthority":"lotus-ai"},"posture":"ready_for_advisor_review","verifierOutcome":"passed","explanationText":"Candidate has elevated idle cash and source-ready evidence.","reasonCodes":["ai_verifier_passed"],"fallbackUsed":false,"fallbackReason":null,"grantsDownstreamAuthority":false,"auditEventType":"idea.ai_explanation.evaluated","redactedEvidence":{"candidateId":"idea_high_cash_8d57adbf52f7f5a7","family":"high_cash","lifecycleStatus":"ready_for_review","reviewPosture":"advisor_review_required","evidencePacketId":"iep_high_cash_8d57adbf52f7f5a7","evidenceContentHash":"sha256:evidence-lineage","supportability":"ready","sourceRefs":[{"productId":"lotus-core:PortfolioStateSnapshot:v1","sourceSystem":"lotus-core","productVersion":"v1","asOfDate":"2026-06-21","freshness":"current","dataQualityStatus":"complete"}],"reasonCodes":["high_cash_ratio","review_required"],"unsupportedReasons":[],"scorePolicyVersion":"idle-liquidity-v1","score":"82","sourceSignalCount":1},"verifiedOutput":{"outputId":"ai-output-001","claimIds":["claim-001"],"proposedActionTypes":["advisor_review"],"verifierRanAtUtc":"2026-06-21T10:12:30Z"},"approvedMetadataKeys":["channel"],"durableStorageBacked":false,"lotusAiRuntimeExecuted":false,"supportedFeaturePromoted":false}
error_examples: 403 returns product-safe Problem Details when the caller lacks idea.ai-explanation.evaluate capability.
404 returns product-safe Problem Details when the candidate is not found.
409 returns product-safe Problem Details when rationale or meeting-preparation drafting is requested before ready evidence and review-ready lifecycle.
400 returns product-safe Problem Details when request validation fails, approved metadata contains forbidden keys, or workflow output is invalid.
endpoints.openapi_evidence: scripts/openapi_quality_gate.py validates summary, description, tag, responses, and examples.

endpoints.purpose: Record an internal advisor review action for a persisted idea candidate through the review workflow foundation.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use as the RFC-0002 Slice 08 and Slice 10 API foundation when an internal caller has a persisted candidate, upstream-authorized scope, idea.review.record capability, advisor role, and Idempotency-Key.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as durable database persistence proof, suitability approval, compliance approval, mandate approval, execution authority, client-communication authority, Gateway contract, Workbench product proof, or supported-feature promotion.
error_examples: 403 returns product-safe Problem Details when the caller lacks idea.review.record capability, a supported review role, or authorized candidate scope.
404 returns product-safe Problem Details when the candidate is not found.
409 returns product-safe Problem Details for idempotency conflict or invalid candidate review state.
400 returns product-safe Problem Details when request validation fails or Idempotency-Key is absent or blank.
endpoints.openapi_evidence: scripts/openapi_quality_gate.py validates summary, description, tag, responses, and examples.

endpoints.purpose: Record source-provenanced internal advisor feedback for a persisted idea candidate through the feedback workflow foundation.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use as the RFC-0002 Slice 08 and Slice 10 API foundation when an internal caller has a persisted candidate, upstream-authorized scope, idea.feedback.record capability, advisor role, and Idempotency-Key.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as durable database persistence proof, model-training automation, data-product certification proof, Gateway contract, Workbench product proof, or supported-feature promotion.
error_examples: 403 returns product-safe Problem Details when the caller lacks idea.feedback.record capability, a supported review role, or authorized candidate scope.
404 returns product-safe Problem Details when the candidate is not found.
409 returns product-safe Problem Details for idempotency conflict.
400 returns product-safe Problem Details when request validation fails or Idempotency-Key is absent or blank.
endpoints.openapi_evidence: scripts/openapi_quality_gate.py validates summary, description, tag, responses, and examples.

endpoints.purpose: Record an internal governed conversion intent for a review-approved persisted idea candidate through the conversion workflow foundation.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use as the RFC-0002 Slice 10 and Slice 12 API foundation when an internal caller has an approved candidate, idea.conversion.intent.record capability, an Idempotency-Key, and needs to record intent-only conversion toward Advise, Manage, or Report.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as durable database persistence proof, downstream proposal authority, manage-review authority, report-authority proof, suitability approval, execution authority, client-communication authority, Gateway contract, Workbench product proof, or supported-feature promotion.
error_examples: 403 returns product-safe Problem Details when the caller lacks idea.conversion.intent.record capability.
404 returns product-safe Problem Details when the candidate is not found.
409 returns product-safe Problem Details for idempotency conflict or invalid conversion state.
400 returns product-safe Problem Details when request validation fails or Idempotency-Key is absent or blank.
endpoints.openapi_evidence: scripts/openapi_quality_gate.py validates summary, description, tag, responses, and examples.

endpoints.purpose: Record an internal source-authorized downstream conversion outcome against a previously recorded idea conversion intent.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use as the RFC-0002 Slice 10 and Slice 12 API foundation when an internal caller has idea.conversion.outcome.record capability, an Idempotency-Key, and source-system evidence that the downstream owner accepted, rejected, failed, or completed the requested realization.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as durable database persistence proof, downstream workflow execution proof, suitability approval, execution authority, client-communication authority, Gateway contract, Workbench product proof, data-product certification proof, or supported-feature promotion.
error_examples: 403 returns product-safe Problem Details when the caller lacks idea.conversion.outcome.record capability.
404 returns product-safe Problem Details when the conversion intent is not found.
409 returns product-safe Problem Details for idempotency conflict or a source system that does not match the conversion target authority.
400 returns product-safe Problem Details when request validation fails or Idempotency-Key is absent or blank.
endpoints.openapi_evidence: scripts/openapi_quality_gate.py validates summary, description, tag, responses, and examples.

endpoints.purpose: Record an internal governed report evidence-pack request against a report-evidence conversion intent without creating Report, Render, or Archive records.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use as the RFC-0002 Slice 13 API foundation when an internal caller has a report-evidence conversion intent, idea.report-evidence-pack.request capability, an Idempotency-Key, and needs a source-provenanced request package for downstream report/render/archive materialization.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as durable database persistence proof, lotus-report package intake proof, lotus-render output proof, lotus-archive record proof, client-ready publication authorization, Gateway contract, Workbench product proof, data-product certification proof, or supported-feature promotion.
error_examples: 403 returns product-safe Problem Details when the caller lacks idea.report-evidence-pack.request capability.
404 returns product-safe Problem Details when the conversion intent or related candidate is not found.
409 returns product-safe Problem Details for idempotency conflict, non-report conversion intent, unready conversion state, or attempted client-ready publication.
400 returns product-safe Problem Details when request validation fails or Idempotency-Key is absent or blank.
endpoints.openapi_evidence: scripts/openapi_quality_gate.py validates summary, description, tag, responses, and examples.

endpoints.purpose: Return the deterministic advisor review queue projection over persisted idea candidate snapshots, optionally constrained by tenant, book, portfolio, and client access-scope filters.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use as the RFC-0002 Slice 07 and Slice 10 API foundation when an internal caller has advisor queue read authority and needs a deterministic queue projection for persisted candidates, including scope-filtered queue reads before Workbench product proof.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Read-only Gateway publication exists through lotus-gateway GET /api/v1/ideas/review-queues/advisor. Do not use as a durable queue store, Workbench product proof, data-product certification proof, PM/compliance/operator queue surface, client-ready publication, or supported-feature promotion.
error_examples: 403 returns product-safe Problem Details when the caller lacks idea.review.queue.read capability or advisor role.
400 returns product-safe Problem Details when evaluatedAtUtc is absent, invalid, or not timezone-aware.
400 returns product-safe Problem Details when scope query fields are blank.
endpoints.openapi_evidence: scripts/openapi_quality_gate.py validates summary, description, tag, responses, and examples.

endpoints.purpose: Return source-safe operator readiness for the deterministic advisor review queue projection, including aggregate queue counts, exclusion counts, durable-storage posture, and certification blockers.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use as the RFC-0002 Slice 07 and Slice 15 operator diagnostic when an internal platform operator has idea.review.queue.readiness.read capability and needs to validate queue projection supportability before Workbench, mesh, or supported-feature promotion.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as candidate detail, raw queue evidence export, candidate identifier discovery, access-scope inspection, durable queue store proof, Gateway contract, Workbench product proof, data-product certification proof, PM/compliance queue support, client-ready publication, or supported-feature promotion.
request_examples: GET /api/v1/review-queues/advisor/readiness?evaluatedAtUtc=2026-06-21T10:10:00Z with X-Caller-Roles: operator and X-Caller-Capabilities: idea.review.queue.readiness.read
error_examples: 403 returns product-safe Problem Details when the caller lacks idea.review.queue.readiness.read capability or operator role.
400 returns product-safe Problem Details when evaluatedAtUtc is absent, invalid, or not timezone-aware.
endpoints.openapi_evidence: scripts/openapi_quality_gate.py validates summary, description, tag, responses, and examples.

endpoints.purpose: Return source-safe operator readiness for the internal high-cash Core source-ingestion run-once worker configuration and certification blockers.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use for internal platform/operator validation when a caller has idea.source-ingestion.readiness.read capability and needs to confirm whether the high-cash Core source-ingestion worker has its manifest, Core base URL, and durable repository configuration in place before attempting a run-once worker execution.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as live Core source-ingestion proof, scheduled worker deployment proof, data-product certification proof, platform source-manifest inclusion proof, Gateway contract, Workbench product proof, business product discovery, or supported-feature promotion.
request_examples: GET /api/v1/source-ingestion/readiness with X-Caller-Roles: operator and X-Caller-Capabilities: idea.source-ingestion.readiness.read
error_examples: 403 returns product-safe Problem Details when the caller lacks idea.source-ingestion.readiness.read capability or operator role.
endpoints.openapi_evidence: scripts/openapi_quality_gate.py validates summary, description, tag, responses, and examples.

endpoints.purpose: Return the repo-authored lotus-idea data-mesh readiness posture, source-of-truth contract paths, and explicit blockers for internal operators.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use for internal platform/operator validation when a caller has idea.mesh.readiness.read capability and needs to confirm the current planned, not-certified mesh posture before product promotion.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as data-product certification proof, platform source-manifest inclusion proof, runtime lineage proof, Gateway contract, Workbench product proof, business product discovery, or supported-feature promotion.
request_examples: GET /api/v1/data-mesh/readiness with X-Caller-Roles: operator and X-Caller-Capabilities: idea.mesh.readiness.read
response_examples: {"repository":"lotus-idea","lifecycleStatus":"planned","certificationStatus":"not_certified","meshRole":"planned_producer_and_consumer","sourceOfTruth":{"producer_declaration":"contracts/domain-data-products/lotus-idea-products.v1.json","trust_telemetry":"contracts/trust-telemetry/idea-candidate.telemetry.v1.json"},"products":[{"productId":"lotus-idea:IdeaCandidate:v1","lifecycleStatus":"proposed","approvedConsumers":["lotus-gateway"]}],"blockers":["data_mesh_not_certified","producer_products_not_active","runtime_trust_telemetry_blocked"],"certificationGatesBeforePromotion":["business capability implemented with source-owned evidence and endpoint certification"],"runtimeTelemetryBacked":false,"platformCertified":false,"supportedFeaturePromoted":false}

503 returns product-safe Problem Details when repo-authored data-mesh readiness contracts cannot be read.

endpoints.purpose: Report lightweight service health for diagnostics and platform smoke checks.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use for simple service health probes and local diagnostics.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as a readiness or dependency-quality signal.
error_examples: Unhandled service errors return product-safe Problem Details.
endpoints.openapi_evidence: scripts/openapi_quality_gate.py validates summary, description, tag, responses, and examples.

endpoints.purpose: Report whether the service process is live.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use for liveness probes that should only prove the process is running.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use to decide whether the service is ready for traffic.
error_examples: Unhandled service errors return product-safe Problem Details.
endpoints.openapi_evidence: scripts/openapi_quality_gate.py validates summary, description, tag, responses, and examples.

endpoints.purpose: Report whether the service is ready to receive traffic.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use for readiness probes and deployment routing decisions.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as a business capability or upstream data-quality signal.
error_examples: 503 readiness response returns {"status":"draining"} during intentional drain.
endpoints.openapi_evidence: scripts/openapi_quality_gate.py validates summary, description, tag, responses, and examples.

endpoints.purpose: Report service identity and policy-version metadata for operators and validators.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use for operator diagnostics, inventory, and validation metadata checks.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as a business data or supportability endpoint.
error_examples: Unhandled service errors return product-safe Problem Details.
